identity.title: Moroccan-Inspired Short Rib Compendium
identity.description: This compendium collects several Moroccan-inspired directions for braised beef short ribs. Each concept shares the same foundation: deeply browned short ribs, slow braising, and a sauce reduced until glossy.

identity.title: Biscuits and Gravy Compendium
identity.description: This compendium separates the canonical recipe from the research supporting it.

identity.title: Pro Beef Stew
identity.description: A slow-cooked beef stew built with deep browning, stock, wine, and a bright acidic finish.

identity.title: Pro Hard-Shell Ground Beef Tacos
identity.description: A crisp hard-shell taco built around juicy seasoned ground beef and layered toppings.

identity.title: Pro-Style Savory Bread Pudding
identity.description: A custardy savory baked bread pudding with cheese, herbs, and either bacon or mushrooms.

identity.title: Pro-Style Bread Pudding
identity.description: A rich dessert bread pudding with browned butter, warm spices, and an optional bourbon sauce.

identity.title: Cacao del Sol Competition Sauce
identity.description: A competition-style barbecue sauce that layers cacao, chipotle, and dark chocolate without drifting into dessert.

identity.title: Canonical Professional Biscuits and Gravy
identity.description: Elevate the classic through better ingredients and technique, not novelty.

identity.title: Pro Cuban Black Beans (Frijoles Negros)
identity.description: A Cuban-style black bean preparation with sofrito, vinegar, and a silky bean broth.

identity.title: Experiments
identity.description: Track hypothesis, changes, tasting notes, and scores for each trial.

identity.title: 9x9 Cookie Bar (or Giant Cookie)
identity.description: A simple chocolate chip cookie dough baked as a bar or giant cookie cake.

identity.title: Pro Grilled Lamb Chops
identity.description: Herb-marinated lamb chops grilled over high heat and finished with lemon and optional mint chimichurri.

identity.title: Ingredient Encyclopedia
identity.description: Document each ingredient's role, chemistry, substitutions, and recommended brands.

identity.title: Restaurant-Style Lobster Corn Chowder
identity.description: A creamy chowder featuring lobster, sweet corn, potatoes, and bacon in a rich broth.

identity.title: Pro Mac & Cheese (Sloppy-Joe-Proof Edition)
identity.description: A structured baked macaroni and cheese with a crisp panko topping and savory cheese blend.

identity.title: Mayan Night BBQ Sauce
identity.description: A smoky, cocoa-driven barbecue sauce with chipotle heat and a rounded, dark finish for grilled meats.

identity.title: Mayan Three-Cacao BBQ Sauce
identity.description: A refined barbecue sauce built around cocoa powder, dark chocolate, and cacao nibs for layered bitterness and smoke.

identity.title: Pro Mexican Rice (Arroz Rojo)
identity.description: A fluffy tomato-forward Mexican rice finished with a savory stock base.

identity.title: Dungeons & Dragons Nacho Bar & Pro Mac & Cheese Bar
identity.description: A multi-component event packet for a themed nacho and mac-and-cheese buffet with proteins, queso, toppings, and service notes.

identity.title: Potaje de Garbanzos con Chorizo
identity.description: A Spanish chickpea, vegetable, and chorizo stew with smoky paprika broth.

identity.title: References
identity.description: Maintain books, papers, interviews, and reputable culinary sources used during research.

identity.title: Research Notes
identity.description: Major findings:

identity.title: Savory Grilled Chicken Wings
identity.description: Dry-rubbed grilled chicken wings with an optional garlic butter finish.

identity.title: Shopping Guide
identity.description: Recommend White Lily flour, quality coarse breakfast sausage, cultured buttermilk, Tellicherry pepper, European butter, whole milk, heavy cream.

identity.title: Pro-Level Sloppy Joes (Rich, Balanced, Not Sugary)
identity.description: A savory-sweet loose beef sandwich filling with ketchup, mustard, Worcestershire, and optional add-ins.

identity.title: Spanish Chicken Noodle Soup (Sopa de Pollo con Fideos)
identity.description: A Spanish-style chicken noodle soup with paprika, tomato, chickpeas, and optional saffron.

identity.title: Spanish-Inspired Rib Dinner Menu
identity.description: A Spanish-style dinner menu centered on smoked paprika ribs with tapas, sides, dessert, and beverage pairings.

identity.title: Spice Library
identity.description: | Spice | Purpose | Typical Amount | Notes | |---|---|---:|---| | Black Pepper | Primary aroma | 1-2 tsp | Use in layers | | Sage | Signature | 1/4-1/2 tsp | Core identity | | Thyme | Structure | 1/8-1/4 tsp | Supports sage | | White Pepper | Finish | 1/8 tsp | Extends heat | | Marjoram | Complexity | 1/8 tsp | German influence | | Ginger | Warmth | pinch-1/8 tsp | Invisible if balanced | | Nutmeg | Dairy bridge | pinch | Freshly grate | | Mace | Floral warmth | pinch | Elegant alternative | | Mustard Powder | Savory lift | 1/8 tsp | Not mustardy | | Cayenne | Bright heat | pinch | Cuts richness | | Fennel | Italian note | tiny pinch | Easy to overdo | | Coriander | Citrus | 1/8 tsp | Chef variation | | Paprika | Warmth | tiny pinch | Avoid muddy color | | Porcini Powder | Umami | 1/4 tsp | Excellent enhancer | | White Miso | Umami | 1 tsp | Chef secret | | MSG | Umami | 1/4 tsp | Optional | | Long Pepper | Historic spice | to taste | Fascinating alternative | | Cubeb | Pepper/allspice | tiny | Historical |

identity.title: Sweet Home Chicago Dip
identity.description: A baked Italian beef dip with sweet-pepper, giardiniera, and jus sections inspired by classic Chicago sandwich orders.

identity.title: Sweet Home Chichén Itzá Sauce
identity.description: A Yucatan-inspired table sauce balancing fire-roasted tomato, cacao, orange, and chipotle.

identity.title: Troubleshooting
identity.description: Thin gravy: simmer longer. Thick gravy: add warm milk. Bland: more pepper, acid, or umami. Greasy: too much fat; balance with roux.
